option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from django.db import models
# Create your models here. class Product(models.Model): name = models.CharField(max_length=100) description = models.TextField() created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
def __str__(self): return self.name
class Review(models.Model): product = models.ForeignKey(Product, related_name='reviews', on_delete=models.CASCADE) author = models.ForeignKey('auth.User', related_name='reviews', on_delete=models.CASCADE) rating = models.IntegerField() comment = models.TextField() created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
def __str__(self): return f'Review for {self.product.name} - Rating: {self.rating}'

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from django.db import models
# Create your models here. class Product(models.Model): name = models.CharField(max_length=100) description = models.TextField() created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
def __str__(self): return self.name
class Review(models.Model): product = models.ForeignKey(Product, related_name='product_reviews', on_delete=models.CASCADE) author = models.ForeignKey('auth.User', related_name='product_reviews', on_delete=models.CASCADE) rating = models.IntegerField() comment = models.TextField() created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
def __str__(self): return f'Review for {self.product.name} - Rating: {self.rating}'

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from django.urls import path
from accounts.views import register_view, register_success_view, login_view, dashboard_view
app_name = "reviews"
urlpatterns = [ path('register/', register_view, name='register'), path('register/success/', register_success_view, name='register_success'), path('login/', login_view, name='login'), path('dashboard/', dashboard_view, name='dashboard'), ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from django.urls import path from . import views
app_name = "reviews"
urlpatterns = [ path('<int:product_id>/add/', views.review_create, name='add'), path('<int:review_id>/edit/', views.review_update, name='edit'), path('<int:review_id>/delete/', views.review_delete, name='delete'), ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Product Hub - All Products{% endblock %} {% block content %}

All Products

Browse our product catalog.

{% if products %}
    {% for product in products %}
  • {{ product.name }} {{ product.description|truncatewords:10 }}
    View Details
    • {% endfor %}
{% else %}
No products found.
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
